@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ version
 Single operator with arguments
 ==================

+from_file "/path/to/file.csv"
 
 ---

         (arguments
           (argument
             (expression
-              (member_expression
-                (expression
-                  (primary_expression
-                    (identifier)))
-                (identifier)))))))))
+              (primary_expression
+                (literal
+                  (string))))))))))
 
 ==================
 Piped operators
 ==================
 
-from stdin | where x > 0 | head 10
+from_stdin | where x > 0 | head
 
 ---

     (statement
       (invocation
         (entity
-          (identifier))
-        (arguments
-          (argument
-            (expression
-              (primary_expression
-                (identifier)))))))
+          (identifier))))
     (statement
       (invocation
         (entity
@@ -83,19 +76,13 @@ from stdin | where x > 0 | head 10
     (statement
       (invocation
         (entity
-          (identifier))
-        (arguments
-          (argument
-            (expression
-              (primary_expression
-                (literal
-                  (number))))))))))
+          (identifier))))))
 
 ==================
 Newline-separated operators
 ==================
 
-from file.json
+from_file "/path/to/file.json"
 where status == "active"
 select user, timestamp

@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ Multiple single-line comments
 ==================
 
 // First comment
-from file.csv
+load "file.csv", csv
 // Second comment
 where x > 0
 
@@ -36,10 +36,12 @@ where x > 0
         (arguments
           (argument

+                  (string)))))

     (comment)

@@ -80,7 +82,7 @@ version
 Inline block comment
 ==================

 ---
 
@@ -94,10 +96,12 @@ from /* source */ file.csv

           (argument
             (expression

 Pipeline with if-else

 if this.type == "important" {
